sentence: BRCA1 pathogenic variant c.5266dupC detected in germline
TP53 missense mutation R175H associated with Li-Fraumeni syndrome
EGFR exon 19 deletion driver mutation in non-small cell lung cancer
Serum cortisol 28.4 μg/dL, above reference range 6–23 μg/dL
HbA1c 8.5%, fasting plasma glucose 186 mg/dL, insulin resistance suspected
C-reactive protein 18 mg/L elevated, ESR 45 mm/hr indicating inflammation
Patient describes persistent low mood, anhedonia and early morning waking
GAD-7 score 15 indicates severe generalised anxiety symptoms
PHQ-9 score 18 severe depression with passive suicidal ideation
Slept four hours last night, anxious all morning, skipped breakfast
Felt overwhelmed at work today, ruminating about feedback from manager
Took 30-minute walk after dinner, mood lifted noticeably afterwards
Patient presents with three-week history of fatigue and unintentional weight loss
Started SSRI sertraline 50 mg daily; review in 6 weeks for tolerance and effect
Admitted for community-acquired pneumonia, empirical amoxicillin commenced
HPA axis activation: hypothalamic CRH triggers pituitary ACTH and adrenal cortisol
Insulin binds receptor, activates GLUT4 translocation, lowering blood glucose
Baroreceptor reflex stabilises blood pressure via sympathetic outflow modulation
